title: High Moff
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:MorlishVeed.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Morlish Veed]], a High [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Fel Empire|Galactic]] [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]].]]

'''High Moff''' was originally a self-aggrandizing title taken by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] during the chaos following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

By [[130 ABY]], it was used as a ceremonial title to designate the [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]] of the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff High Council]] of the [[Fel Empire|Fel]] and later [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empires]]. [[Morlish Veed]], who also held the rank of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] at the time, was given the title following his victory at the [[Battle of Caamas]].

In [[Darth Krayt]]'s Empire, all six members of the Moff Council held the rank by [[137 ABY]].<ref name="Legacy 0.5">[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0½|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0½]]</ref>
